abstracts.abstract:
SB 1408 - Currently, the maximum speed limit on rural interstates and freeways of this state is seventy miles per hour.  This act increases the maximum speed limit on such roads to seventy-five miles per hour.
TAYLOR MIDDLETON

bill.title:
SB 1408 - Currently, the maximum speed limit on rural interstates and freeways of this state is seventy miles per hour.  This act increases the maximum speed limit on such roads to seventy-five miles per hour.
TAYLOR MIDDLETON

action.description: Reported Duly Enrolled Rules, Joint Rules, Resolutions & Ethics Committee
